name: goal-kit
description: Goal helpers and slash commands for Codex goals

interface.longDescription: Adds local slash commands for drafting and troubleshooting Codex goals, plus a skill for writing durable built-in /goal objectives.
defaultPrompt: Draft a concise Codex goal for this repo
Turn docs/goal.md into a built-in /goal command
Diagnose why built-in /goal is unavailable here
